problem: Finance, Accounting, HR, Product Manager all require revisions (missing pricing recommendation, common error flags, policy updates, feature scoping). Pattern: domain-specific outputs are incomplete. Revision rate for finance/accounting/strategy roles is 100% (1 revision / 1 task).
business_impact: Slows strategic decision-making (e.g., pricing ladder for post–Stage 2 is undefined; no CPA review playbook exists). Blocks GTM phase gates that require pricing discipline and accounting ops clarity. Delays hiring/retention roadmap.
recommended_solution: Audit and update domain-specific agent prompts (Finance, Accounting, HR, Product) to include mandatory output sections: Finance → PRICING RECOMMENDATION (tiers + anchor logic); Accounting → COMMON ERRORS TO CATCH + CPA REVIEW FLAGS; HR → POLICY UPDATES (e.g., remote work, AI training); Product → FEATURE SCOPING (effort/impact matrix). Add checklist validation to each agent's output gates. Route updates to Knowledge Base for reusable playbook capture.
estimated_effort: 12–16 hours (prompt engineering + output schema + KB documentation)
dependencies: Knowledge Base (playbook templates), each domain agent (prompt + output validation update)
expected_roi: Reduces domain-agent revision rate from 100% to <10%. Stabilizes pricing strategy for GTM scale-up. Enables faster hiring + policy decisions as firm grows.

problem: Fullstack Engineer reports task completion but has no validation that 'queue item exists before architecture planning' (DevOps baseline, 2026-07-07 note). 8 open cross-dept requests exist; no single source of truth on which engineering work is actually queued or in progress. Risk of duplicate effort or orphaned tasks.
business_impact: Engineering velocity appears high (3 agents completed) but task traceability is weak. Potential for rework, missed dependencies, and integration failures. Blocks accurate engineering sprint planning and capacity forecasting.
recommended_solution: Deploy a lightweight Engineering Task Queue (GitHub Issues or Notion table): (1) every cross-dept request targeting Engineering is auto-logged with ID, priority, dependencies; (2) Fullstack/Backend/Frontend agents validate queue state before starting work; (3) daily dashboard widget shows queue depth, WIP, and blocker reasons. Integrate with GitHub Actions so task closure auto-updates queue. Implement in <24 hours using existing GitHub infra (no new tools).
estimated_effort: 8–12 hours (queue schema + GitHub Actions automation + agent prompt updates)
dependencies: DevOps (GitHub Actions), Fullstack/Backend/Frontend engineers (queue validation in pre-execution checklist)
expected_roi: Reduces engineering rework by ~20%. Improves cross-dept request closure time from ~36 hours to ~12 hours. Provides CFO-level visibility into engineering capacity vs. demand.

problem: Marketing sequences not confirmed live. Open request (26d3e187, P1) asks for 'email sequences deployed, nurture cadence status, analytics (open/click/unsubscribe rates for 176 leads).' Only 3 emails sent total against 176 leads — nurture cadence either incomplete or paused.
business_impact: Beachhead funnel (free scan → flat-fee offer) requires automated 5-email sequence (day 0, 3, 7, 14, 21). Without live, deployed sequences, lead engagement is near-zero. Conversion will plateau at 0% until nurture is operational. Directly blocks Stage 0 completion.
recommended_solution: Marketing + Analytics sprint (24 hours): (1) Confirm all 5 nurture emails (day 0 scan link, day 3 check-in, day 7 insight, day 14 case study, day 21 polite close) are live and scheduled in email platform. (2) Pull open/click/unsubscribe metrics for all 176 leads to date. (3) Audit segment: are only e-commerce sellers (beachhead niche) receiving sequences, or is list mixed? (4) Deploy missing sequences immediately. (5) Submit complete report to Documentation for handoff to Compliance.
dependencies: Marketing (email platform access, sequence validation), Analytics (lead engagement metrics), Documentation (outcome reporting)
expected_roi: Live nurture cadence = first statement scans within 7 days. Enables day 0 conversion tracking. Path to 5% MQL rate (176 → ~9 qualified leads) within 30 days.

problem: Documentation agent stuck in revision loop (1 revision, 1 task needed). Outputs contain 'I cannot' language, blocking cross-dept handoffs (3 open requests from Compliance, Marketing, Engineering all awaiting completed work inventories). Documentation is not supplying task completion details before requesting work from other departments, violating the meta-request SOP.
business_impact: 3 P1–P2 cross-dept requests backed up (compliance audit, marketing analytics, engineering task log). Blocks visibility into work completed and prevents quality gates closure. Slows decision-making and approvals.
recommended_solution: Implement mandatory 'task inventory submission' workflow for Documentation before routing to any department: (1) collect completed task IDs, titles, outcomes, dates from the requesting agent; (2) validate all 7-day task list (21 tasks recorded) is documented; (3) route only complete inventories to downstream departments. Add a dashboard widget showing Documentation task queue and revision reasons. Train agent on meta-request approach (2026-07-07 SOP note).
estimated_effort: 8 hours (workflow design + SOP clarification + agent prompt update)
dependencies: Documentation (retraining), Compliance + Marketing + Engineering (supply task completion metadata when documentation requests it)
expected_roi: Clears 3 blocked requests within 24 hours. Improves cross-dept transparency and approval velocity. Reduces revision rate from 100% to <20%.

problem: GTM Plan Gate 0 incomplete: zero paid clients, zero statement scans delivered, zero case studies. No conversion funnel operational yet. At 176 leads with 0% conversion and only 3 emails sent, the beachhead offer (free statement scan → 24h report → flat $299/mo) is not live or not being deployed.
business_impact: Blocking progression to Stage 1 (first paying client). Without operational free-scan funnel, the entire go-to-market strategy stalls. Pipeline value ($88k) is theoretical until conversion mechanism proves. Estimated 30–60 day delay to first revenue if not resolved.
recommended_solution: Immediate audit: (1) Is the free scan intake form live on scrollandfind.com? (2) Is the 24h automated report-generation workflow deployed? (3) Are nurture sequences (day 0, 3, 7, 14, 21) actually sending? (4) Is e-commerce seller targeting live (Shopify/Amazon). Root-cause the gap between 176 leads and 0 scans. Route a 2-person sprint (Marketing + Fullstack Engineer) to validate and unblock the scan submission → report delivery → follow-up pipeline within 48 hours.
dependencies: Marketing (confirm nurture sequences), Fullstack Engineer (validate scan intake form + report generation workflow), Analytics (confirm 176 leads have received Day 0 email with scan link)
expected_roi: Unblocks GTM Stage 0→1 transition. First paying client likely within 14 days of scan funnel going live. Path to $5k MRR within 60 days.
